data.title: Congresswoman Bought Bitcoin Dip In March: Here's How Much Her Trade Was
data.description: Members of Congress' trading activities are raising concerns among retail investors due to potential conflicts of interest. A particular Congresswoman, Sheri Biggs (R-S.C.), has attracted attention for purchasing a significant amount of shares in the iShares Bitcoin ETF (NASDAQ: IBIT). The purchase, valued between $100,000 to $250,000, was made through a professionally managed account by her spouse on March 4. This is not the first time Biggs has bought shares of this Bitcoin ETF. The timing of trades and committee assignments raise red flags, emphasizing the need for transparency in such transactions. The iShares Bitcoin Trust stock is currently trading close to recent lows, prompting traders to keep a watchful eye on IBIT's performance.

data.title: Davidson Bogel Real Estate Facilitates Multi-Parcel Assembly for Lovett Industrial Development Project in Lewisville, Texas
data.description: In Lewisville, Texas, Davidson Bogel Real Estate (DB2RE) recently aided in the purchase of an 8.5-acre industrial land assemblage at 421, 451, 475, and 493 Bennett Lane. The acquisition was made by Lovett Industrial for the development of a high-quality industrial project. This development is in line with Lewisville's updated regulations for industrial developments. The deal was overseen by Philip Cherrick of DA, marking a significant step in the city's industrial growth strategy.

data.title: LGI Homes Expands in the Salt Lake City Market with Grand Opening of Desert Edge
data.description: LGI Homes is excited to unveil the new development, Desert Edge, marking an expansion into Tooele County and the Salt Lake City market. This grand opening signifies a significant milestone for the company as they continue to grow their presence in the region.

data.title: Black Iron Inc. has successfully closed its $10 million LIFE offering.
data.description: One new report has found that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, which is the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. The report also shows that over 200,000 new jobs were created last month, exceeding expectations. The strong job market has led to an increase in average hourly earnings by 3.1% compared to last year. This positive economic news has been welcomed by many experts and policymakers.

data.title: HYTN Introduces HARd Remediation to GMP Processing Services, Releases Product in Germany
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 17, 2026, HYTN Innovations Inc. introduced the commercial release of Hermetic Autogenous Remediation™ (HARd) for qualified dried cannabis flower plans. HYTN, a pharmaceutical company focusing on products with psychoactive and psychotropic elements, unveiled this new service offering. The Company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE: HYTN), Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FSE: 85W0), and OTC Pink (OTC Pink: HYTNF).

data.title: Saltchuk Marine and Harbor Docking & Towing Form Green Tug Towing Joint Venture, Begin Construction on Four Advanced Hybrid Escort Tugs to Serve Woodside Louisiana LNG
data.description: Seattle-based Saltchuk Marine, LLC and Lake Charles, Louisiana's Harbor Docking & Towing (HDT) have collaboratively launched a new company named Green Tug Towing (GTT). This joint venture aims to deliver towage, escort, and terminal assistance services across the United States. GTT secured a significant 20-year contract with Woodside Energy to construct and manage four cutting-edge hybrid escort tugboats catering to LNG carrier activities at Woodside Energy's fresh Calcasieu Parish terminal.

data.title: Boundless Bio Presents Preclinical Breast Cancer Data from its Oral Kinesin Degrader Program at 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: New research findings are backing the advancement of BBI-940 in Phase 1 clinical trials. This oral medication is a selective kinesin degrader that shows promise as a pioneering treatment for certain types of advanced or metastatic breast cancer. The results are encouraging and suggest that BBI-940 could be a groundbreaking therapy option for this patient population. This study is significant in the development of innovative treatments for breast cancer patients, with implications for potential future therapies. The clinical trials for BBI-940 aim to establish its efficacy and safety profile in treating advanced or metastatic breast cancer patients, with the ultimate goal of improving outcomes and quality of life for these individuals.

data.title: REPAY Confirms Receipt of Unsolicited, Non-Binding Proposal from Forager Capital Management
data.description: Repay Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: RPAY) has received a non-binding proposal from Forager Capital Management, LLC to acquire all outstanding shares at $4.80 per share in cash. REPAY, a provider of payment processing solutions, will review the offer in accordance with its fiduciary responsibilities.

data.title: wXRP tokens valued at over $1.2 million can now be used on Solana, enhancing DeFi potential for the Ripple-linked asset.
data.description: Wrapped XRP tokens (wXRP) valued at over $1.2 million have recently been generated on the Solana blockchain. This development showcases the increasing DeFi functionality of the Ripple-associated asset.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges On Hormuz Reopening; Tesla, Palantir Climb (Live Coverage)
data.description: The stock market saw a surge today, with the Dow Jones index making significant gains. Tesla and Nvidia experienced positive movements, while a mining company saw a jump in response to news regarding Greenland. The Dow surged following the reopening of the Hormuz Strait. Tesla and Palantir also climbed during today's trading session.

data.title: Celularity Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notice Regarding Late Form 10-K Filing
data.description: Celularity Inc., a regenerative and cellular medicine company, based in Florham Park, New Jersey and listed on Nasdaq under CELU, received notification from Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on April 16, 2026, for not filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. This non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1), requiring timely financial report filings with the SEC, was noted. However, this notification does not immediately impact the trading or listing status of Celularity Inc.'s common stock and warrants on Nasdaq Capital Market, which are identified as "CELU" and "CELUW".
